card_name_verified: U.S. Bank Business Altitude® Connect Visa Signature® Card ($95 AF after first year intro $0)
_review_reason: Per Convention C: $25 statement credit requires 3 consecutive monthly taxi/rideshare transactions — CONDITIONAL → exclude. Priority Pass with 4 visits/yr (qualitative, not USD). No fixed unconditional USD recurring credits. Earnings 4x travel/gas, 2x dining/cell.
